home.heroSubtitle: Invest in projects, manage your wallet, book air tickets, access Islamic resources — everything you need as a Bangladeshi in Singapore, in one place.
home.servicesTitle: Everything You Need in One Place
home.servicesSubtitle: From financial services to community tools — built specifically for Bangladeshi expatriates in Singapore.
home.svc1Desc: Invest in community projects. Buy, sell and trade shares with admin-verified transparent transactions.
home.svc2Desc: Secure internal wallet for deposits, share purchases and all platform service payments.
home.svc3Desc: Book and refer air tickets. Track referrals and earn commissions through your network.
home.svc4Desc: Request a taxi with pickup location, destination, date, time, and vehicle type preferences.
home.svc5Desc: Live exchange rates for BDT, SGD and all major currencies. Always up to date.
home.svc6Desc: Stay updated with community news, important guides and announcements from our team.
home.svc7Desc: Surah collection, duas, Islamic articles and a full PDF library with an online reader.
home.svc8Desc: Post lost or found items with images. Share on Facebook and WhatsApp to reach the community.
home.svc9Desc: Direct WhatsApp support channel. Get quick help from our team at any time.
home.mktSubtitle: Invest in verified community projects. Every transaction is manually approved by our admin team — transparent, secure and community-driven.
home.mktPoint2: Manual payment approval — bKash, Nagad, Bank Transfer
home.mktPoint3: Secondary market: list your shares for resale
home.mktPoint4: Dynamic share pricing set by admin

home.howSubtitle: Join thousands of community members in 3 simple steps.
home.step1Desc: Register with your email address. Verify via OTP to activate your account instantly.
home.step2Desc: Add your personal information and profile photo to get full access to all platform features.
home.step3Desc: Explore the marketplace, convert currency, book tickets and connect with your community.
home.ctaSubtitle: Register today and get access to all platform features — completely free for community members.

contact.faq1Q: How do I verify my account?
contact.faq1A: After registration, check your email for a 6-digit OTP code. Enter it on the verification page to activate your account.
contact.faq2Q: How long does a deposit take to process?
contact.faq2A: Deposits are verified by our admin team within 2–4 hours during business hours (9am–6pm SGT). Weekends may take longer.
contact.faq3A: Browse active projects, choose a quantity and payment method, then submit your request. Admin approves and transfers shares to your account.
contact.faq4A: Yes. Log in and navigate to your portfolio, then list your shares for sale. Another community member can purchase through the secondary market.
contact.faq5A: Your NID is stored securely and only used for identity verification. It is never shared with third parties.
contact.faq6Q: How do I contact a driver for taxi?
contact.faq6A: After submitting a taxi request our team will WhatsApp you within 1 hour to confirm the driver details.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your data
privacy.intro: Singapur Probashi Community Platform ("we", "our", "the Platform") is committed to protecting the privacy of our members. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.s1Body:
We collect the following information when you register and use the Platform:

• Personal identity: Full name, National Identity Document (NID) number, email address, phone number, and profile photo.
• Financial data: Payment transaction IDs submitted for wallet deposits and share purchases. We do not store credit card or full bank account numbers.
• Usage data: Log data, IP addresses, browser type, and activity on the Platform for security and analytics purposes.
• Communications: Any messages you send to our support team.
privacy.s2Body:
Your data is used to:

• Verify your identity and activate your account.
• Process share purchases, wallet deposits, and other transactions.
• Send OTP verification codes and important account notifications.
• Provide customer support.
• Detect and prevent fraud or unauthorised access.
• Comply with applicable Singapore laws and regulations.

We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties.
privacy.s3Body:
We may share your data with:

• Trusted service providers who operate the platform infrastructure (e.g. database hosting, email delivery) under strict confidentiality agreements.
• Law enforcement or regulatory authorities if required by Singapore law.
• Other community members only to the extent necessary — for example, your name and phone number appear on your Lost & Found posts to allow community contact.

Your NID number is never shared with other members.
privacy.s4Body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as required by law. If you request account deletion, we will remove your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required for legal, tax, or fraud-prevention purposes.
privacy.s5Body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted passwords (bcrypt), HTTPS-only connections, HTTP-only session cookies, and regular security reviews. However, no system is 100% secure. Please use a strong, unique password and do not share your login credentials.
privacy.s6Body: We use a single session cookie (sp_session) to keep you logged in. We also set a googtrans cookie to remember your language preference. No third-party advertising cookies are used. The Google Translate widget may set its own cookies governed by Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.s7Body:
Under Singapore's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) 2012, you have the right to:

• Access the personal data we hold about you.
• Correct inaccurate personal data.
• Withdraw consent for data use (which may affect your ability to use certain features).
• Request deletion of your account and personal data.

To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@singapurprobashi.com.
privacy.s8Body: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s9Body:
For privacy-related questions or data requests, contact:

Email: privacy@singapurprobashi.com
WhatsApp: +65 XXXX XXXX

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions for using our platform
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using the Singapur Probashi Community Platform. By registering or using the Platform, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1Body: The Platform is intended for Bangladeshi nationals and expatriates residing in or connected to Singapore. You must be at least 18 years old to register. By registering, you confirm that the information you provide — including your name, NID number, email, and phone — is accurate and belongs to you.
terms.s2Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. Do not share your NID number or password with anyone. You are liable for all activities that occur under your account. Report any unauthorised access to us immediately at support@singapurprobashi.com.
terms.s3Body:
The share marketplace facilitates community-based investment in approved projects. Important terms:

• Share purchases are subject to admin approval and are not guaranteed.
• Investments carry risk. Past performance does not guarantee future returns.
• The Platform does not provide financial advice. Invest only what you can afford to lose.
• Share transfers are finalised only after admin approval and payment verification.
• The Platform reserves the right to suspend or delist any project at its discretion.
terms.s4Body:
• Wallet balances are held in trust for the purposes of the Platform.
• Deposits are credited only after verification of payment evidence by an admin.
• Withdrawals are subject to Platform policies and may require identity re-verification.
• We are not a licensed bank or financial institution. Wallet balances are not insured.
• In the event of disputes over deposits, the Platform's decision is final.
terms.s5Body:
• Air ticket and taxi bookings are facilitated by community agents, not the Platform directly.
• Prices displayed are indicative. Actual prices are confirmed at the time of booking.
• Cancellation and refund policies are determined by the respective agents.
• The Platform is not liable for flight delays, cancellations, or driver no-shows.
terms.s6Body:
When you post content (blog comments, lost & found posts, etc.), you grant the Platform a non-exclusive licence to display that content. You must not post:

• False, misleading, or defamatory content.
• Content that violates Singapore law, including the Sedition Act or POHA.
• Spam, scam offers, or unsolicited commercial content.
• Content infringing third-party intellectual property rights.

The Platform reserves the right to remove any content and suspend accounts that violate these rules.
terms.s7Body:
You must not:
• Attempt to gain unauthorised access to other users' accounts or the Platform's systems.
• Use the Platform to launder money or fund illegal activities.
• Impersonate another person or provide false identity information.
• Manipulate the share marketplace through wash trading or coordinated manipulation.
• Use automated bots or scrapers without express written permission.
terms.s8Body:
To the maximum extent permitted by Singapore law, the Platform is not liable for:

• Investment losses in the share marketplace.
• Losses arising from reliance on currency exchange rates displayed on the Platform.
• Service interruptions or data loss due to technical failures.
• Actions or conduct of third-party agents (taxi drivers, ticket agents, etc.).

The Platform's total liability to any user is limited to the amount paid by that user to the Platform in the preceding 3 months.
terms.s9Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Singapore. Any dispute arising from these Terms shall first be attempted to be resolved through mediation. If mediation fails, disputes shall be referred to the Singapore courts.
terms.s10Body: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes via email at least 7 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Platform after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.s11Body:
For questions about these Terms:

Email: legal@singapurprobashi.com
WhatsApp: +65 XXXX XXXX
